visa_types.name: Family Reunification
visa_types.documents_required:
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Yvi2UXHihwyvLeWKK4HDA/52d85f28f65dd5ef9ccccb34585465a8/Family_reunification.pdf)
- For more information : Home | Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Cairo (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/kahira-en)
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > ken > en > Family Reunification Fees]
The Embassy requests payment for visa fee in Euro.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 2, 264 in EGP (Inclusive of Tax) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- Any other applicable fee in EGP is as per the current exchange rate. specified and announced by the European Central Bank or the Slovak National Bank on the day preceding the first calendar day of the months in which the fee is collected. 
- The additional fees charged by visa company could be changed without prior notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time: The diplomatic mission shall decide about an application for the granting of national visa within 30 days from its receipt. The diplomatic mission may grant the national visa only after prior consent of the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic.

Application for Visa in English 
Application for Visa in Slovak
Application for the temporary permanent
Checklist for Family reunification
visa_types.overview:
Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa please click here. (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/taipei-en/services/national_visa#18536_cyuu_inpage_nav_0)
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
For guidelines on how to apply for a national visa please click here. (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/taipei-en/services/national_visa#18536_cyuu_inpage_nav_0)

## Visa Fees

[svk > ken > en > Family Reunification Fees]
The Embassy requests payment for visa fee in Euro.
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 2, 264 in EGP (Inclusive of Tax) payable online.
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- Any other applicable fee in EGP is as per the current exchange rate. specified and announced by the European Central Bank or the Slovak National Bank on the day preceding the first calendar day of the months in which the fee is collected. 
- The additional fees charged by visa company could be changed without prior notice.
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Document Checklist – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Yvi2UXHihwyvLeWKK4HDA/52d85f28f65dd5ef9ccccb34585465a8/Family_reunification.pdf)
- For more information : Home | Embassy of the Slovak Republic in Cairo (https://www.mzv.sk/en/web/kahira-en)

## Photo Specifications
Please provide two recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
The diplomatic mission shall decide about an application for the granting of national visa within 30 days from its receipt. The diplomatic mission may grant the national visa only after prior consent of the Ministry of Interior of the Slovak Republic.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa in English 
Application for Visa in Slovak
Application for the temporary permanent
Checklist for Family reunification

- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required

## Photo Specifications

visa_types.name: Cultural / Sports
visa_types.documents_required:
- Documents Required – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/774Nq0m9HifBnyQfyBX1MP/5aa960bb0920205a857cdb14df9d47d1/Short_Term_Schengen_visa_required_documents.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.
visa_types.visa_fees:
[svk > ken > en > Cultural / Sports Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid  at the bank in EUR. 
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 2428 in EGP (Inclusive of Tax) payable online. 
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- In accordance with the valid legislation certain categories of Schengen visa applicants may be exempt from the obligation to pay a visa fee. A visa fee waiver can be based on the Visa Code, on a visa facilitation agreement concluded with the European Union or on national law. For further details contact the Embassy.  
- The fee is not affected by number of entries or length of validity of the requested visa. The Embassy requires visa fees payment in Euro currency. When lodging the application at the visa centre the applicant is required to pay not only the visa fee but also servise and additional fees charged by the visa centre for the provided services. Payment could be done in a local currency of the location where the application has been lodged, using the reference exchange rate specified and announced by the European Central Bank or the Slovak National Bank on the day preceding the first calendar day of the months in which the fee is collected. 
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.
visa_types.processing_time:
- The visa application should in principle be lodged at least 15 calendar days before the intended visit, taking into account the deadlines of the diplomatic mission for making a decision on the application. 
- The decision-making procedure may take up to 15 calendar days since the receipt the application at the Embassy. In individual cases, where further scrutiny of the application is necessary, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days. Exceptionally, where additional documentation is required, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. 
- Under Article 22 of the Visa Code, a Member State may require the central authorities of other Member States to consult its central authorities during the examination of visa applications lodged by nationals of specific third countries or specific categories of such nationals. Such consultation does not apply to applications for airport transit visas.

Checklist for Cultural / Sports
visa_types.overview:
Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.
visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
This category of visa caters to people wishing to visit Slovakia for Tourist purposes. Applicants will have to provide evidence that he/she falls under this category.

## Visa Fees

[svk > ken > en > Cultural / Sports Fees]
The above-mentioned Visa Fee is to be paid  at the bank in EUR. 
VFS Service charge:
Applicants applying at the Visa Application Centre shall be levied a service charge of 2428 in EGP (Inclusive of Tax) payable online. 
Please Note:
- The child between 0 - 12 years on the date of submission at VFS are Biometric exempt.
- In accordance with the valid legislation certain categories of Schengen visa applicants may be exempt from the obligation to pay a visa fee. A visa fee waiver can be based on the Visa Code, on a visa facilitation agreement concluded with the European Union or on national law. For further details contact the Embassy.  
- The fee is not affected by number of entries or length of validity of the requested visa. The Embassy requires visa fees payment in Euro currency. When lodging the application at the visa centre the applicant is required to pay not only the visa fee but also servise and additional fees charged by the visa centre for the provided services. Payment could be done in a local currency of the location where the application has been lodged, using the reference exchange rate specified and announced by the European Central Bank or the Slovak National Bank on the day preceding the first calendar day of the months in which the fee is collected. 
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Documents Required – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/774Nq0m9HifBnyQfyBX1MP/5aa960bb0920205a857cdb14df9d47d1/Short_Term_Schengen_visa_required_documents.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
- The visa application should in principle be lodged at least 15 calendar days before the intended visit, taking into account the deadlines of the diplomatic mission for making a decision on the application. 
- The decision-making procedure may take up to 15 calendar days since the receipt the application at the Embassy. In individual cases, where further scrutiny of the application is necessary, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days. Exceptionally, where additional documentation is required, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. 
- Under Article 22 of the Visa Code, a Member State may require the central authorities of other Member States to consult its central authorities during the examination of visa applications lodged by nationals of specific third countries or specific categories of such nationals. Such consultation does not apply to applications for airport transit visas.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa in English 
Application for Visa in Slovakian
Checklist for Cultural / Sports

A visa fee waiver can be based on the Visa Code, on a visa facilitation agreement concluded with the European Union or on national law. For further details contact the Embassy.  
- The fee is not affected by number of entries or length of validity of the requested visa. The Embassy requires visa fees payment in Euro currency. When lodging the application at the visa centre the applicant is required to pay not only the visa fee but also servise and additional fees charged by the visa centre for the provided services. Payment could be done in a local currency of the location where the application has been lodged, using the reference exchange rate specified and announced by the European Central Bank or the Slovak National Bank on the day preceding the first calendar day of the months in which the fee is collected. 
- The Visa fee and service charges are non-refundable in case the visa is refused.

## Documents Required
- Documents Required – Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/774Nq0m9HifBnyQfyBX1MP/5aa960bb0920205a857cdb14df9d47d1/Short_Term_Schengen_visa_required_documents.pdf)
- Document Checklist - Click here (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/5PpaJjbb5EBLDOaEamYvMj/501180a5e7f8b5235ad50e45803ffe25/Check_list_-_Schengen_visa_medical_treatment_.pdf)
- Travel insurance is mandatory for all Schengen countries.

## Photo Specifications
Please provide one recent colour photograph (not more than 6 months old) of yourself, meeting the following requirements:
- Taken against a light (white or off-white) background so that features are distinguishable and contrast against the background.
- Clear quality and with the face in focus
- Full face: non-smiling, no sunglasses, no hat/cap or any head covering, unless the applicant wears such items because of his/her religious belief or ethnic background
- Printed on normal photographic paper (camera print)
- Please stick the photograph on the Visa Application Form
If the photographs presented do not meet these requirements (click here), then the visa application will be considered incomplete and applicant will be asked to take new photographs in the photo booth in the visa application centre.

## Processing Time
- The visa application should in principle be lodged at least 15 calendar days before the intended visit, taking into account the deadlines of the diplomatic mission for making a decision on the application. 
- The decision-making procedure may take up to 15 calendar days since the receipt the application at the Embassy. In individual cases, where further scrutiny of the application is necessary, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 30 calendar days. Exceptionally, where additional documentation is required, the deadline may be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days. 
- Under Article 22 of the Visa Code, a Member State may require the central authorities of other Member States to consult its central authorities during the examination of visa applications lodged by nationals of specific third countries or specific categories of such nationals. Such consultation does not apply to applications for airport transit visas.

## Download Forms
Application for Visa in English 
Application for Visa in Slovakian
Checklist for Tourism
